message:
feat(layout): S3-FIFO layout cache with generation invalidation (bd-l6yba.3)

S3FifoLayoutCache provides scan-resistant eviction for layout memoization.
Same API as LayoutCache (get_or_compute, invalidate_all, stats, clear)
with generation-based invalidation. 8 tests including equivalence check
against the existing LRU cache.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
